data.title: Update project docs to reflect rebase-aware test gate
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md and related project documentation to reflect REBASE_HEAD handling alongside MERGE_HEAD in the test gate, review gate, hash computation, and hook architecture sections.
**Why**: Ensures future agents have accurate awareness of rebase-aware behavior across all hook scripts.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md hook architecture section, test gate documentation, review gate documentation
- OUT: New documentation files (update existing only)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md documents REBASE_HEAD handling alongside MERGE_HEAD in the hook architecture and test gate sections
- When this story is complete, any existing references to MERGE_HEAD filtering note the symmetric REBASE_HEAD support
